shearing_bite.description: Delivers a powerful beak attack to the neck, instantly killing or severely wounding the target.

special_abilities.name: Glass-Storm
special_abilities.description: The Razor-Strider body-checks the target, shredding its side with their glass feathers. Deals 5 damage and applies a bleed effect.

unique_features.name: Auditory Warning
unique_features.description: When a pack of Razor-Striders runs, their feathers clack together, creating a sound like wind chimes in a gale. If you hear the chimes, the pack is already flanking you.

unique_features.name: Feather-Knives
unique_features.description: Molted feathers are prized by Ironborn assassins or Quill-Kin surgeons as single-use scalpels that are sharper than steel.
